name: Broker Profile
description: Personal brand page for an individual real estate broker. Magazine-editorial meets luxury — a full-bleed hero portrait, prominent RERA credentials, live listings grid with filter tabs, area-by-area expertise, awards and press mentions, long-form testimonials with property details, and a private-consultation booking form. Mobile-first so brokers can share their link on WhatsApp.

meta_description.label: Meta Description
meta_description.default: James Whitfield — Senior Property Consultant at Luxe Properties Dubai. RERA-certified. 127 deals closed. AED 380M+ transacted. Specializing in luxury villas and off-plan investment in Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, and Downtown.

about_quote.label: About Quote
about_quote.default: I don't sell properties. I help people find the home — or the investment — that changes the course of the next decade of their life.

about_text_1.label: About Paragraph 1
about_text_1.default: Born in London and raised between Dubai and the UK, I came to the GCC property market in 2018 after a decade in private wealth advisory. What drew me in was the pace — and what kept me was the people. Real estate in this city is personal. Every family I work with is writing the next chapter of their life on the line.

about_text_2.label: About Paragraph 2
about_text_2.default: Today I specialize in luxury villas across Palm Jumeirah and Emirates Hills, off-plan investments in Creek Harbour and Dubai South, and discreet commercial mandates for family offices. I lead all my own deals end-to-end — no junior handoffs — and I speak to each of my clients weekly, even three years after close.

about_text_3.label: About Paragraph 3
about_text_3.default: My philosophy is simple: do right by one client and you earn the next ten for free. After 127 transactions, I've never paid for a lead. Every client arrives through a referral from someone I helped before. That's the standard I hold myself to — and it's the standard you can expect from me.

about_meta.label: About Meta
about_meta.default: Based in Dubai Marina · Speaks English, Arabic, Russian

specialties_title.label: Specialties Title
specialties_title.default: Six Property Types. Deep Expertise in Each.

specialties_intro.label: Specialties Intro
specialties_intro.default: Most brokers dabble in everything. I focus on six property types — the ones I know best, the ones where I can consistently get my clients better outcomes than the market average.

listings_intro.label: Listings Intro
listings_intro.default: Every listing here is one I'd recommend to a family member. Prices reflect current market and include full disclosure on service fees, community fees, and any upcoming assessments.

areas_intro.label: Areas Intro
areas_intro.default: I know these six communities street-by-street — the schools, the service fees, the market cycle, and every seller and buyer active in the area right now.

awards_title.label: Awards Title
awards_title.default: Proof of the Work — Not Just the Talk

awards_intro.label: Awards Intro
awards_intro.default: Recognition that matters — issued by independent bodies, earned from client outcomes, and renewed each year through continuous deals and satisfaction scores.

award_1_issuer.label: Award 1 Issuer
award_1_issuer.default: Real Estate Regulatory Agency · Dubai Land Department

press_1_headline.label: Press 1 Headline
press_1_headline.default: "The new generation of Dubai brokers putting clients over commission"

press_2_headline.label: Press 2 Headline
press_2_headline.default: "How James Whitfield is rewriting the rules of Palm Jumeirah luxury sales"

press_3_headline.label: Press 3 Headline
press_3_headline.default: "Inside a record-breaking AED 85M Palm villa deal"

testimonial_1_quote.label: Testimonial 1 Quote
testimonial_1_quote.default: We interviewed five brokers before we picked James. He was the only one who told us honestly that the building we wanted had a service-fee problem coming — and he walked us to a better option. Closed in six weeks, AED 400K under asking.

testimonial_2_quote.label: Testimonial 2 Quote
testimonial_2_quote.default: As an overseas investor, I needed a broker I could trust with a remote deal. James sent weekly voice notes, organised all the compliance, and even supervised the handover while I was in Geneva. Yield is already 7.4% after 11 months.

testimonial_3_quote.label: Testimonial 3 Quote
testimonial_3_quote.default: We sold our Palm villa through James after a prior agent sat on it for 11 months. He priced it right, produced a proper campaign in 48 hours, and brought us three qualified offers in the first week. Exchanged at AED 28.5M — on budget, on schedule.

process_title.label: Process Title
process_title.default: A Four-Step Process. Every Client. Every Deal.

process_intro.label: Process Intro
process_intro.default: Some things don't scale. This process is one of them. I personally handle every step — from the first conversation to the handover of keys.

step_1_text.label: Step 1 Text
step_1_text.default: We start with a private 45-minute conversation. I take time to understand what you actually want, what you can comfortably afford, and where compromise is okay — or not.

step_2_text.label: Step 2 Text
step_2_text.default: I curate 4 – 6 shortlisted options — including off-market listings you won't find anywhere else. Every property comes with a full data pack: comps, service fees, rental yields, and risks.

step_3_text.label: Step 3 Text
step_3_text.default: Once you've picked the property, I negotiate hard — with full transparency on my commission. My clients average 4 – 8% below first-ask, and I document every concession in writing.

step_4_text.label: Step 4 Text
step_4_text.default: I personally supervise the DLD transfer, key handover, and snag inspection. After close, I stay in touch — weekly for the first month, then quarterly for as long as you own the property.

booking_intro.label: Booking Intro
booking_intro.default: Book a private consultation — no obligation, no pressure. Tell me what you're looking for and I'll come to our first call with three shortlisted options.

contact_intro.label: Contact Intro
contact_intro.default: You reach me — not a junior, not a call center. Every message gets a personal response from me within two hours during business hours.

contact_office.label: Contact Office
contact_office.default: Luxe Properties Dubai, Building 7, DIFC, Dubai, UAE

contact_map_placeholder.label: Contact Map Placeholder
contact_map_placeholder.default: Google Maps — Luxe Properties Dubai · DIFC

footer_tagline.label: Footer Tagline
footer_tagline.default: Senior Property Consultant at Luxe Properties Dubai. Helping families, investors, and family offices buy, sell, and hold premium real estate across the Emirates since 2018.

footer_rera_disclaimer.label: RERA Disclaimer
footer_rera_disclaimer.default: RERA Disclaimer — This website is operated by James Whitfield, licensed broker with the Dubai Real Estate Regulatory Agency (RERA License 12345678) under Luxe Properties Dubai. All properties listed are subject to availability and verification. Listing prices and availability are accurate at the time of publication and may change without notice. No offer or contract is formed by the use of this website. All transactions are subject to Dubai Land Department regulations.
